series_metadata.series_title: SAIC and the Statewide Terrorism Analysis and Crime Center Suspicious Activity Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Includes suspicious activity reports and all supporting documentation, including, but not limited to, emails, photographs, and recordings submitted by law enforcement agencies, first responders, and the general public to the Strategic Analysis and Information Center (SAIC) and the Statewide Terrorism Analysis and Crime Center (STACC).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: five (5) years from review and validation. ; Electronic: five (5) years from review and validation
